introSection: Leocoaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Leolandia in Capriate San Gervasio, Lombardy, Italy.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a single helix.

fullText:
Leocoaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Leolandia in Capriate San Gervasio, Lombardy, Italy.

The ride has a single helix.
